scripts.prod: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.prefetch:check: rg -n 'prefetch=\{true\}' apps/storefront/components/layout/product-grid-items.tsx apps/storefront/components/page-renderer/nodes/related-products.tsx apps/storefront/components/grid/three-items.tsx apps/storefront/components/cms/blocks/featured-products.tsx apps/storefront/components/cms/blocks/product-carousel.tsx apps/storefront/components/layout/category-card.tsx apps/storefront/components/carousel.tsx && (echo 'Remove prefetch={true} from high-cardinality link surfaces.' && exit 1) || exit 0
scripts.storefront:theme:ci: npm run theme:guard && npm run theme:catalog:guard && npm run theme:light-only:guard && npm run i18n:runtime:guard && npm run branding:svg-network:guard && npm run theme-pack:wiring && npm run storefront:css:budget
